data.body: Root cause found: merge-to-main.sh only runs bump-version.sh when --bump is explicitly passed. Without it, the version_bump phase logs 'INFO: --bump not specified -- skipping version bump' and moves on. Since --bump is not passed by default during worktree merges, no automatic version bumps have been occurring. Fix options: (1) make --bump the default behavior when version.file_path is configured, or (2) have /dso:sprint pass --bump when invoking merge-to-main.sh.
